[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010000 1
1 0010000010 2
2 1000110010 4
3 0101100011 5
4 1100110100 5
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 10 1100100000 3
12 21 0000010100 2
23 32 0000010000 1 match 0
34 43 0000000000 a match 5 6 7
45 54 1000000010 2
56 65 0000100010 2
67 76 0101100010 4
70 07 1101100010 5

02 20 0000000011 2
13 31 0000010000 1 match 0
24 42 0010000110 3
35 53 0000010000 1 match 0
46 64 0010000010 2 match 1
57 75 1000110010 4 match 2
60 06 0101100011 5 match 3
71 17 1100110100 5 match 4

14 41 1000000100 2
25 52 0000010010 2
36 63 0001000000 1
47 74 1000000110 3

61 16 0100100000 2
72 27 0000010110 3
